# datahub_glossary_nodes (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Returns the URNs of all DataHub glossary nodes (Term Groups) visible to the authenticated principal.

Backed by `searchAcrossEntities` (OpenSearch). Nodes created within the last few seconds may not yet appear. Use the returned `urns` list as the `for_each` value in `import {}` blocks to bulk-import an existing glossary hierarchy into Terraform state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "datahub_glossary_nodes" "all" {}

output "glossary_node_urns" {
  value = data.datahub_glossary_nodes.all.urns
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `urns` (List of String) List of DataHub URNs for all glossary nodes (e.g. `["urn:li:glossaryNode:finance"]`).
